title: spiesia mollis
intro: Spiesia mollis, also known as Chinese chervil or Chinese parsley, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The health benefits of Spiesia mollis include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Spiesia mollis is often used as a tea or added to soups and stews, and it can also be taken as a supplement in capsule or tablet form.
